creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
>>Description:
> GNU gzip was deleted from src tree, but without it 'make buildworld'
> breaks the build.

Are you sure you have the latest CVS sources available for this? I am
rebuilding 6-STABLE a lot (and recently 6.2 as well) And I did not
encounter this ....

Please double check, thanks!

Remko

-- 
Kind regards,
